labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621991 ($5,586,877,704) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621991 ($20,233,246,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $232,617 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621991); class <5: 110 firms, avg revenue/firm $699,491 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $110,520 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 36 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,004,972 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $158,786 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 44 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,787,477 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $440,421 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 62 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,349,516 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,793,224 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 69 firms, avg revenue/firm $49,057,246 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $7,751,045 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 38 firms, avg revenue/firm $418,654,053 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $66,147,340 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 131
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)
